rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (4/10) and reach identical substantive conclusions: strong geospatial/GIS domain experience, distributed-systems exposure at Sociomantic, but a significant gap in modern C++/Rust with only dated 2014-2015 C/C++ work and a recent TypeScript/Node.js stack. The differences are pure rewording and minor elaboration (e.g., 'six months' restating the 2014-2015 window, a 'screening call' suggestion). None of the variant's reasoning keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to James Smith — no new concerns about nationality, origin, or institution were introduced.
